articles.title: 2 siblings drown in Vermont river, brother tried to save younger sister, police say
articles.description:
Sandro Lala, 25, and Yazmin Yupangui, 11, died in accidental drownings, police said.

The post 2 siblings drown in Vermont river, brother tried to save younger sister, police say appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: City declines to use reserve funds to prevent BPS layoffs as more than 560 positions are cut
articles.description:
Faced with continued enrollment declines, school officials in Boston say that their new budget maintains a 10:1 student to teacher ratio.

The post City declines to use reserve funds to prevent BPS layoffs as more than 560 positions are cut appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Harmful bacteria persist in Merrimack River days after Haverhill sewer break
articles.description:
Water testing continues to detect elevated bacteria levels despite an emergency bypass, while some shellfish harvesting areas remain closed.

The post Harmful bacteria persist in Merrimack River days after Haverhill sewer break appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Boater remains missing after crash off of Salisbury Beach
articles.description:
Two people were rescued and brought to local hospitals following the Friday night crash, but one man is still missing.

The post Boater remains missing after crash off of Salisbury Beach     appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: After officiating Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding, Adam Sandler played pickup basketball in this Mass. vacation hotspot
articles.description:
Comedian Adam Sandler surprised a group of pickup basketball players in Massachusetts by jumping in for a game on Sunday, less than 48 hours after officiating Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding in New York City.

The post After officiating Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding, Adam Sandler played pickup basketball in this Mass. vacation hotspot appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Poll: Most in Mass. think police hid evidence in Karen Read case
articles.description:
Nearly two-thirds of Bay Staters also believed police conduct in Read’s case was definitely or probably indicative of a wider problem with policing in Massachusetts.

articles.title: Duxbury man drowns while swimming to his boat
articles.description:
Authorities received reports about a swimmer in distress in Duxbury Bay just after 4:30 p.m. Sunday.

articles.title: Groveland ice cream shop goes viral with scoop-tossing video
articles.description:
A playful video of employees "throwing out" ice cream into the owner’s mouth has racked up tens of millions of views, drawing attention to Jeff and Maria’s in Groveland.
